title: TMW Hats
body:
This hat mod aims to add more unique head accessories. Currently there are very few options, but plan to add more over time. Each of the hats are purely cosmetic at this point in time.

Currently, there are two hat types:
- Bunny Ears (6 Variants)
- Jester Hat (15 Variants)

It is recommended that you run this mod with "Cosmetic Armor Reworked", as it allows you to wear the hats without replacing your helmat, however, it is not 100% necessary.

How to obtain hats:
- Bunny Ears: _Chance drop from Rabbits & Bunnys._
- Jester Hat: _The red hat is craftable, and the other variants can be obtained by dying the red one._

Special Variants:
- Freaky Jester's Hat: _Take your Black Orange Jester Hat, and add a diamond to it in the crafting menu._
